title: SpiceQL Kernel Report Schema
description: JSON schema for kernel reports returned by SpiceQL API functions. These reports document which SPICE kernels were loaded or found during API operations like getTargetStates, getTargetOrientations, etc.

quality_kernels.description: Kernel collection organized by quality level (reconstructed, predicted, smithed, noquality, deps), or directly with kernels array

kernels.description: Array of kernel file paths, or a single kernel path as a string (used when no quality levels apply)
Array of kernel file paths, or a single kernel path as a string
Simple kernel collection without quality levels
Array of kernel file paths, or a single kernel path as a string

mission_or_instrument.description: Kernel set for a specific mission or instrument identifier

ck.description: C-kernel (Camera/pointing kernel) - spacecraft orientation and camera pointing data

spk.description: SPK (Spacecraft/planet kernel) - ephemeris data for spacecraft and celestial bodies

tspk.description: TSPK (Target SPK) - ephemeris data specific to target bodies

sclk.description: SCLK (Spacecraft clock) - spacecraft clock correlation data

iak.description: IAK (Instrument addendum kernel) - additional instrument parameters

dsk.description: DSK (Digital shape kernel) - surface shape models

pck.description: PCK (Planetary constants kernel) - planetary physical and orientation constants

deps.description: Dependencies - additional required kernels or data
